title: Sub-sub tasks
excerpt: It would be great to have another level of sub-tasking. This will greatly improve more complicated processes.

posts.author: ryan.l87 (Ryan Leach)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have another level of sub-tasking. This will greatly improve more complicated processes.

posts.author: brett.henkel (Brett Henkel)
posts.cookedHtml:
this is a frustrating limitation with Monday, which one thinks could be easily resolved.

the software is fabulous, but this particular shortfall severely hampers utility on projects with complexity. I sincerely wish this would get some attention in development.

Being directed by Monday to post requests like this on a community board doesn’t offer me much hope for any semblance of quick resolution.
